description: Vector fields; div, grad and curl operators; line integrals; Green's Theorem; surface integrals; flux; Divergence Theorem; Stokes' Theorem; multivariate Taylor series; Fourier series; first and second order differential equations with applications; variation of parameters; reduction of order; power series solutions about ordinary points; Laplace transform.
preAndCorequisites:
• Complete 1 of:
    • MATH200 - Calculus III (1.5)
    • MATH205 - Multivariable Calculus (1.5)
supplementalNotes: • Credit will be granted for only one of MATH 201, MATH 204, MATH 300.
title: Calculus IV
